info.title: FlexOps API - Core Services Documentation
info.description: FlexOps Logistics and Fulfillment API   [DEV - v1.2.9246.6531]

get.summary: Gets the order status distribution for a date range.
Gets shipping cost analytics for a date range.
Gets delivery performance analytics for a date range.

deliveredCount.description: The number of successfully delivered shipments.

inTransitCount.description: The number of shipments in transit.

count.description: The count of orders with this status.

statusCounts.description: The count of orders by status.

costVariance.description: The variance between estimated and actual costs.

averageEstimatedCost.description: The average estimated cost per shipment.

averageActualCost.description: The average actual cost per shipment.

warehouses.description: The list of warehouse stock information.

totalStock.description: The total stock in the warehouse.

uniqueSkuCount.description: The number of unique SKUs in the warehouse.

oauth2.description: OAuth2 using AuthorizationCode Flow with Azure AD

ApiKey.description: API Key authentication via X-Api-Key header
ApiKey.name: X-Api-Key
